# docs(cloud-deployment): raise quality + make the path discoverable (WhyDeploy hub + ordering)

Part of #14310 · follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** the `cloud-deployment/` guides are weak (below the bar) and unreachable as a top-down path from the comprehension layer — readers arrive (if at all) without the why.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] `WhyDeploy.md` becomes the hub; an ordered learning path is defined (Brain-benefit → WhyDeploy → Day0Tutorial → TenantIngestionModel → Configuration → Security → deep mechanics) and wired into `tree.json`.
- [ ] Raise the weakest guides in the set to the goose-bumps + clarity bar (problem → resolve → why-care); cross-links from `ArchitectureOverview` / `DeployingTheAgentOS`.

**Files:** `learn/agentos/cloud-deployment/` (WhyDeploy + ordering + the weak guides) + `learn/tree.json`.
